title: 11 Herbal Creams to Help Musicians with Ear Infection
description: Calendula officinalis creams can be a helpful treatment for ear infections due to their anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. This plant-based cream contains triterpenoid saponins, flavonoids, and carotenoids, which work together to soothe and protect the affected area. The anti-inflammatory properties of calendula can reduce swelling and ease pain, while its antimicrobial properties can help combat bacterial or fungal infections that may be causing the ear infection.
